task_completion.description: Verify the correct patient (Jayson Fadel) is selected for the encounter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the patient name 'Jayson Fadel' and DOB '1992-06-30' (or PID 3) in the active patient banner or encounter header.

task_completion.description: Verify the PHQ-9 score of 8 is documented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the number '8' entered in a score field, or the appropriate radio buttons selected in a PHQ-9 form that sum to 8.

task_completion.description: Verify the interpretation 'Mild depression' is noted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Mild depression' or 'Mild' selected in a dropdown or typed into an interpretation/severity field.

task_completion.description: Verify the required clinical note is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exact text 'Patient reports symptoms several days per week. Denies suicidal ideation. Will continue to monitor.' in a text area or notes section.

task_completion.description: Verify the screening documentation has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message (e.g., 'Saved'), the form appearing in a read-only state, or the screening listed in the patient's encounter history.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the graphical user interface to document the screening.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with web forms, buttons, and text fields, not terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Ensure the documentation is entered into the actual medical records system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be a clinical application (e.g., OpenEMR), not a generic text editor or word processor.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually saved the form rather than just typing the values and stopping.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots should show the aftermath of clicking a 'Save' button, such as a confirmation toast, a refreshed page, or the record in a list view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Jayson Fadel, PID: 3, DOB: 1992-06-30. Expected PHQ-9 Score: 8. Expected Interpretation: Mild depression (or 'mild'). Required Clinical Note: 'Patient reports symptoms several days per week. Denies suicidal ideation. Will continue to monitor.'
